help.title: Sotong guide
help.subtitle: Set up once and you're done.
help.notifyTitle: ① First time — turn on notifications
help.notifyBody: Adding to the home screen alone won't deliver alerts. Open the app (home-screen icon) and tap ‘Turn on notifications → Allow’. On iPhone, requires iOS 16.4+ and must be done inside the installed app.
help.flowBody: Push alert → guest summary in inbox → [Start consultation] translated chat → [Start service] → 30-sec record → report auto-sent to the guest.
help.photoTitle: ③ Record needs both before & after photos
help.photoBody: You must capture both before and after photos to send the report (rear camera, the treated area). For returning guests, last visit's products & condition are pre-filled.
help.tip: If alerts don't arrive, ask the owner for your ‘current inbox link’. Old links won't open the inbox.

inbox.title: Waiting guests
inbox.subtitle: Consultations that came in today
inbox.invalid: Invalid inbox address. Please check with the salon admin.
inbox.assignFailed: Couldn't take it. Please try again.

notify.title: 새 손님 알림
notify.description: 새 손님이 접수하면 휴대폰으로 바로 알려드려요.
notify.denied: 알림이 차단되어 있어요. 브라우저 설정에서 알림을 허용한 뒤 다시 시도해 주세요.
notify.success: 알림을 켰어요. 새 손님이 오면 알려드릴게요.
notify.failed: 알림을 켜지 못했어요. 다시 시도해 주세요.
notify.iosHint: 아이폰은 Safari 공유 버튼(아래 가운데) → '홈 화면에 추가' 로 설치한 뒤, 홈 화면에 생긴 소통 아이콘으로 열어서 '알림 켜기'를 눌러주세요. (Safari 탭에서는 알림을 켤 수 없어요)
